failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT p.id AS publication_id
FROM publication p
JOIN profile pr ON p.profile_id = pr.id
WHERE pr.username ILIKE '%Balne%C3%A1rio+Cambori%25'
AND p.description_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'pasta')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.description_lexemes, to_tsquery('english','pasta')) DESC
LIMIT 10
